name: black_box_with_high_fanout_outputs
description: Code should include a black-box module with many output signals that drive many downstream cells, creating high fanout conditions that stress ABC9's node-fanout optimization delay model.
snippet: module black_box(output [7:0] o1, output [7:0] o2); endmodule

name: abc9_nf_optimization_sequence
description: Code should include a design that triggers ABC9 node-fanout optimization with complex box interactions, where sweep and DC2 optimization alter the network in ways that cause the NF step's delay bound check to fail.

name: large_io_ratio_blackbox_circuit
description: Code should include a circuit with high input-to-output ratio combined with many black-box modules, creating conditions where ABC9's node-fanout optimization cannot satisfy delay constraints during tech mapping.
